title: Microbes in Human Welfare
subtitle: Microbes in food, industry, sewage treatment, biogas, biocontrol and biofertilisers - a visual factory-to-field guide.

heroModel.title: Microbial factory
heroModel.subtitle: Drag to rotate - scroll to zoom

roadmapTitle: Microbes are useful in homes, factories, farms and sewage plants.
roadmapDescription: Track the same idea everywhere: microbes convert raw material into useful products or ecological services.
flowchart:
flowchart LR
  A[Microbes] --> B[Household food]
  A --> C[Industrial products]
  C --> D[Antibiotics and chemicals]
  A --> E[Sewage treatment]
  E --> F[Biogas]
  A --> G[Biocontrol]
  A --> H[Biofertilisers]

roadmap.title: Household products
roadmap.summary: Curd, cheese, idli, dosa and bread use microbes.

roadmap.title: Industrial fermentation
roadmap.summary: Large fermenters produce alcohol, organic acids, enzymes and antibiotics.

roadmap.title: Sewage treatment
roadmap.summary: Microbes reduce organic matter and BOD.

roadmap.title: Biogas
roadmap.summary: Methanogens produce methane-rich gas from dung and waste.

roadmap.title: Biocontrol
roadmap.summary: Living organisms control pests and pathogens.

conceptDescription: Each card links organism, process and product so examples stop feeling random.

sections.title: Microbes in household products
sections.description: Fermentation by microbes improves food texture, taste and nutrition.
points: Idli and dosa batter is fermented by bacteria.
Some cheeses are ripened by specific microbes.
sections.neet: Lactobacillus increases vitamin B12 in curd.

sections.title: Industrial products
sections.description: Large-scale microbial fermentation produces useful chemicals and beverages.

sections.title: Antibiotics and enzymes
sections.description: Microbes produce molecules that affect other organisms or catalyse reactions.
points: Penicillin was discovered by Alexander Fleming.
Pectinases and proteases clarify fruit juices.
sections.neet: Penicillium notatum is linked with penicillin.

sections.title: Sewage treatment
sections.description: Microbes degrade organic matter in sewage and reduce BOD.
points: Primary treatment removes grit and solids physically.
BOD falls as organic matter is consumed.
sections.neet: Secondary sewage treatment is biological treatment.

sections.title: Biogas production
sections.description: Methanogens produce methane from anaerobic digestion of organic waste.
points: Methanobacterium is found in cattle rumen.
Biogas contains methane, carbon dioxide and hydrogen.
Dung and sewage sludge can be used as substrate.
Biogas plants provide fuel and manure.

sections.title: Microbes as biocontrol agents
sections.description: Biological control reduces dependence on chemical pesticides.
points: Biocontrol is usually ecological and targeted.
sections.neet: Baculoviruses are useful because they are narrow spectrum.

sections.title: Biofertilisers
sections.description: Biofertilisers improve nutrient availability using microbes.
points: Rhizobium fixes nitrogen in legume roots.
Azotobacter and Azospirillum fix nitrogen in soil.

sections.title: Microbes as welfare tools
sections.description: The chapter shows microbes as production systems and ecosystem partners.
points: Fermentation creates food and industrial products.
sections.neet: Microbes are not only pathogens; many are economically useful.

modelTitle: Microbe factory and ecosystem service lab.
modelDescription: Rotate fermenter, nutrient cycling and product models.
highYield: Penicillin is linked with Penicillium notatum.

mistakes.title: BOD direction
mistakes.body: Good sewage treatment lowers BOD because organic matter is reduced.

mistakes.title: Biogas organism
mistakes.body: Methanogens, not yeast, produce methane-rich biogas.

mistakes.title: Biofertiliser vs biocontrol
mistakes.body: Biofertilisers improve nutrients; biocontrol agents reduce pests/pathogens.

quiz.question: Brewer yeast is:
quiz.explain: Saccharomyces cerevisiae ferments sugars to ethanol.

quiz.question: Citric acid is produced by:
quiz.explain: Aspergillus niger is used for citric acid.

quiz.question: BOD after effective sewage treatment:
quiz.explain: Lower BOD means less organic pollution.

quiz.question: Rhizobium is important for:
quiz.explain: Rhizobium fixes nitrogen in legume nodules.

quiz.question: Baculoviruses are useful because they are:
